channel.title: Chambers of AK Legal Insights
channel.description: Informational legal insights from Chambers of AK on cheque bounce, MSME, RERA, arbitration, commercial recovery, property and civil litigation matters.
channel.copyright: 2026 Chambers of AK - Advocates & Legal Consultants

item.title: Case Brief: Can Non-Reportable Judgments Be Published Online?
item.description: Gujarat High Court case brief on non-reportable judgments, online publication, public court records and the distinction between online availability and formal law reporting.

item.title: SARFAESI Auction Sale Challenge: Documents And Rule 9(4) Timeline
item.description: Document-first guide to SARFAESI auction sale challenge: demand notice, possession notice, auction terms, Rule 9(4) balance consideration, sale certificate, redemption record and DRT/DRAT preparation.

item.title: Summary Judgment in Commercial Suits | Order XIII-A CPC
item.description: Document-first guide to summary judgment in commercial suits under Order XIII-A CPC after the Supreme Court decision in Reliance Eminent Trading v DDA: pleadings, documents, real prospect test and enquiry checklist.

item.title: MSME Facilitation Council Process For Delayed Payment Claims
item.description: General guide to MSME Facilitation Council process for delayed payment claims: Udyam records, invoice documents, conciliation, arbitration, interest, buyer response and enforcement preparation.

item.title: Cheque Bounce Case After Summons: Defence Preparation Under Section 138
item.description: General guide to cheque bounce defence preparation after summons in Section 138 NI Act matters: complaint papers, notice proof, liability documents, appearance, settlement and court-stage checklist.

item.title: Section 34 Arbitration Award Challenge
item.description: General information on challenging arbitral awards, limitation, documents and award-stage review.

item.title: MSME 45-Day Payment Rule
item.description: General information on the 45-day payment issue under the MSME delayed-payment framework.

item.title: MSME Documents Checklist
item.description: Document checklist for MSME delayed-payment and recovery matters.

item.title: Cheque Bounce Notice Limitation
item.description: General information on cheque bounce notice timelines and limitation-sensitive dates.

item.title: Section 138 Cheque Bounce Limitation
item.description: General information on limitation in Section 138 cheque bounce matters.

item.title: Commercial Suit Documents Checklist
item.description: Document checklist for commercial suit and recovery preparation.

item.title: Arbitration Notice Before Claim
item.description: General information on preparing an arbitration notice before a claim.

item.title: Property Injunction Suit Documents
item.description: Document-first guide to property injunction suit preparation: title papers, possession proof, threat records, prior cases, property identifiers and first enquiry format.

item.title: RERA Refund Interest Delayed Possession
item.description: General information on RERA delayed possession, refund and interest issues.

item.title: Commercial Recovery Before Suit
item.description: General information on commercial recovery preparation before filing a suit.

item.title: Arbitration Clause Checklist
item.description: Checklist for reviewing arbitration clauses in commercial documents.
